name: 4pk Banzai Wicker / Wood Patio Chaise Lounge Chair Brown - Christopher Knight Home: Weather-Resistant with Side Table
description: These Christopher Knight Home Banzai Wicker/Wood Chaise Lounges with Pull-Out Trays (Set of 4) are sure to impress at your next backyard BBQ. Featuring a wicker seat and back set upon an acacia wood frame with the added bonus of a pull-out side tray, these lounges are sure to impress.  Place them around your pool to have a place for you and your friends to lounge or around your backyard patio.  You will always have a place to relax with these Christopher Knight Home Banzai Wicker/Wood Chaise Lounges.
